title: Downstream
description: This modpack includes mods like create, ad astra and a bunch more!
body:
This modpack adds a variaity of mods such as but not limited to **Create**, **Applied Energistics 2**, QOL mods (**Simple Voice Chat**, Contiuitity, and BetterF3 to name a few), and, a couple addon mods for Create.

To see a full list of mods go do the versions tab and click on the latest version and scroll down to dependencies.

If you have any suggestions for mods you can make a issue on the issues repo and we will see if it fits the modpacks theme, and the only caveat is that its not discontinued, and its for **1.20.1**.

# QNA

- Q: Who is this modpack for?
- A: Anyone that wants to play a enjoyable modded experience.

- Q: Is there a server?
- A: Not currently but if there is enough downloads there might be!

- Q: Will you update to 1.20.4 or newer?
- A: When create and its addons update.

# Credits
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat),

[When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)
